dorks.title: API Endpoints
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:api | site:*/rest | site:*/v1 | site:*/v2 | site:*/v3
dorks.bing: site:example.com (url:api OR url:rest OR url:v1 OR url:v2 OR url:v3)
dorks.duckduckgo: site:example.com (api OR rest OR v1 OR v2 OR v3)

dorks.title: API Docs
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:apidocs | inurl:api-docs | inurl:swagger | inurl:swagger-ui.html | inurl:swagger.json | inurl:api-explorer | inurl:redoc | inurl:openapi | intitle:"Swagger UI"
dorks.bing: site:example.com (url:apidocs OR url:swagger OR url:swagger-ui.html OR url:swagger.json OR url:api-docs OR title:"Swagger UI")
dorks.duckduckgo: site:example.com (apidocs OR swagger OR swagger-ui.html OR swagger.json OR "api documentation")
dorks.brave: site:example.com (url:swagger OR url:swagger-ui.html OR url:apidocs OR url:redoc)
dorks.baidu: site:example.com (swagger OR swagger-ui OR api documentation)

dorks.title: GraphQL Endpoints
dorks.google: site:example.com inurl:graphql | inurl:graphiql | inurl:playground | intitle:"GraphQL Playground" | intitle:"GraphiQL"
